text:
Market today: Tech names are still the focus, but sentiment seems cautious. Any big moves are likely driven by individual company news or broader macro shifts.

Your holdings: SOXL is still a big loser (-44.02%) and flagged for attention. QQQ, SMH, and QQQI are also flagged for trimming, showing slight losses.

Watch: Keep an eye on NVDA and ASML setups. They have strong scores and are in discount zones.

Bottom line: Manage your laggards and watch for any confirmation on the tech names showing strength.
plays: Trim QQQ/QQQI if they break below their stops (QQQ 670, QQQI 52).
Consider trimming SMH if it breaks below 540.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
